welcomeDialog.title: Welcome to eHagaki
welcomeDialog.description: eHagaki is a post-only Nostr client. You can compress images and videos before sending them.
welcomeDialog.features:
Key Features:
• Save data usage with automatic image/video compression
• Visual editor that lets you edit exactly as it will appear without a separate preview
• Pin hashtags for consecutive posts
• Supports custom emoji, multiple accounts, and drafts
• Reply, Quote, and Channel post support
• Upload media directly from the share button of external apps (Android)
• Embeddable as an iframe in other apps

loginDialog.hint_input_secret: Enter a secret key starting with nsec1
loginDialog.parent_client_hint: Allow login on the parent page to continue
loginDialog.parent_client_not_available: Parent client login is not available in this embed
loginDialog.parent_client_timeout: No response was received from the parent page
loginDialog.parent_client_auth_rejected: Login was rejected on the parent page
loginDialog.parent_client_not_logged_in: Log in on the parent page and try again
loginDialog.parent_client_disconnected: The parent client connection was lost
loginDialog.parent_client_invalid_response: The parent page returned an invalid response
loginDialog.extension_login_failed: Login with the browser extension failed
loginDialog.secret_too_short: Secret key is too short (must be 63 characters)
loginDialog.secret_too_long: Secret key is too long (must be 63 characters or less)
loginDialog.nostrconnect_input_title: Connect with QR Code or bunker://
loginDialog.nostrconnect_relay_hint: Configure the relay candidates used for the connection.
loginDialog.nostrconnect_relay_switch_hint: If the remote signer supports relay switching, it may switch to different relays after connecting.
loginDialog.nostrconnect_relay_update_hint: Available relays are used in the connection URI and QR code. Changing the candidates or restoring defaults starts a new connection wait.
loginDialog.nostrconnect_relay_required: At least one relay is required for NIP-46 connections.
loginDialog.nostrconnect_open: Open remote signer on this device
loginDialog.nostrconnect_direct_open_hint: If the remote signer does not open, scan the QR code or copy the connection URI.
loginDialog.nostrconnect_timeout: The remote signer did not connect in time
loginDialog.nostrconnect_relay_reconciliation_failed: Could not confirm the final relay list after connecting
loginDialog.nostrconnect_no_usable_final_relay: The remote signer did not return any usable connection relay. Browser connections require a wss:// relay or a local relay available on this device.
loginDialog.nostrconnect_local_final_relay_unreachab: Could not connect to the local relay specified by the remote signer. When using a local relay on this device, confirm that a relay app such as Citrine is running. If this page is embedded, the parent frame may also need local/loopback network access permission. When using a remote signer on another device, configure a shared wss:// relay instead.
loginDialog.nostrconnect_final_relay_verification_fa: Communication could not be verified on the relay selected by the remote signer. Check the relay status and the remote signer's configuration.
loginDialog.nostrconnect_connection_failed: Failed to connect to the remote signer. Check the connection relays or the remote signer state.
loginDialog.add_account_hint: Login with the account you want to add

logoutDialog.last_account_reset_warning: Logging out of all accounts deletes authentication data, account data, profiles, relays, emojis, drafts, shared media, and related image caches saved by eHagaki.
logoutDialog.last_account_reset_error: Failed to delete saved data. Please try again later.

profileDialog.title: Profile
profileDialog.nip46_connection_description: Depending on your remote signer, the first connection check may require an approval action. After a successful check, this connection will automatically try a connection check when returning from the background.
profileDialog.nip46_connection_checking: Checking the connection to the remote signer...
profileDialog.nip46_connection_auto_recovering: A connection check after returning from the background is in progress. Try again after it finishes.
profileDialog.nip46_connection_success: The remote signer is reachable. Automatic connection checks will now be attempted after long background resumes.
profileDialog.nip46_connection_failed: Could not confirm a response from the remote signer. Check any approval action on the remote signer, its connection state, or whether the app is running, then try again.

postHistory.title: Post History
postHistory.description: Local history of events successfully posted from eHagaki.
postHistory.repair: Refetch posts around the current view
postHistory.deleteRequestDescription: Send a deletion request for this post to relays.
postHistory.deleteRequestWarning: Deletion is a relay request and is not guaranteed.
postHistory.deleteLocalHistoryDescription: Clear the post history, related caches, and view position records saved on this device for this account. Posts on Nostr relays will not be deleted. Post history may appear again later after sync or refetch.
postHistory.deleteLocalHistoryFailed: Failed to clear saved post history
postHistory.repliesNotFound: No replies were found in this range

settingsDialog.image_short_edge_protection_note: For images where the long edge is at least {aspectRatio}x the short edge, eHagaki adjusts the short edge to at least {pixels}px to keep text readable. The megapixel limit is {megapixels} MP and still takes priority.
settingsDialog.uploadDestinationBud03InfoScope: "Publish to relays" (BUD-03) saves only Blossom upload destinations as kind 10063 `server` tags. NIP-96 and Custom HTTP destinations are excluded.
settingsDialog.uploadDestinationBud03InfoOrder: When publishing, enabled Blossom destinations are saved in this list order, and the first destination is preferred.
settingsDialog.uploadDestinationBud03InfoFetch: Fetching from relays replaces only the Blossom upload destinations with the fetched results.
settingsDialog.client_tag_label:
Add client name to post 
(Client tag)
settingsDialog.hide_mascot_note: Turn this on to hide the top-left mascot. Flavor text is also hidden while this is enabled.
settingsDialog.hide_flavor_text_note: Turn this on to hide only the mascot's flavor text. Success, error, and tips will still appear in a compact format.
settingsDialog.hide_flavor_text_note_included: While the mascot is hidden, this setting is forced on automatically.

postComponent.secret_key_detected: Your post contains a private key. Are you sure you want to post it?

videoNode.not_supported: Your browser does not support the video tag.

draft.title: Draft
draft.list_description: Select a saved draft to restore
draft.limit_reached: You have reached the draft limit (20). Delete the oldest draft and save?
draft.info: Drafts are stored in your browser. They will be deleted if you clear browser data or logout.

flavor: Told I got a small face.

replyQuote.quote_notification_off_tooltip: Quoted users will not be notified
